  wd:Q111830 wdt:P1225 ?win.
  ?win wdt:P162 ?competition.
  ?competition rdfs:label ?compLabel.
  FILTER (LANG(?compLabel) = 'en')
  FILTER (CONTAINS(STR(?compLabel), 'pre-season'))
  ?win wdt:P585 ?date.
  FILTER (ql:year(?date) >= 1988 && ql:year(?date) <= 2013)
} ORDER BY DESC(?date) LIMIT 1
